cards.title: Google DeepMind Launches ATL Saathi: Gemini-Powered Teaching Assistant for India's 1.1 Crore Students
cards.why_it_matters: Shows how a frontier lab (DeepMind/Google) is deploying Gemini in a large-scale, curriculum-grounded, multilingual educational context — a concrete production case study in responsible AI deployment and teacher-in-the-loop design.
cards.summary: Google DeepMind has launched ATL Saathi, a Gemini-powered web app giving India's Atal Tinkering Lab educators a 24/7 planning and training assistant. It covers 12 ATL curriculum modules via micro-learning (summaries, AI infographics, quizzes), supports push/pull project generation for 10 modules, and offers multilingual interaction starting with 8 languages. Content is maintained in NotebookLM.
